content.claim: Six- and eight-year gimnázium enrollment represents approximately 8% of each age cohort, with applications to six-year programs rising 11% year-on-year while eight-year applications fell 14% in 2026, suggesting a shift toward the more selective later-entry track.
content.context: Fresh live research through the School network planning lens
limitations: Single year of application data; trend direction is clear but one-year data cannot establish stability
Data source is a podcast citation; original Ministry admission records not directly verified
Does not explain whether the shift reflects parental preference change or demographic pressure
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
